'''garava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwalliso|kwalliso]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwalliso|kwalliso]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| garava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gærævæth|gærævæth]] || [[word:gærævæj|gærævæj]] || [[word:gærævæsh|gærævæsh]] || [[word:gærævæ|gærævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gararavath|gararavath]] || [[word:gararavaj|gararavaj]] || [[word:gararavash|gararavash]] || [[word:gararava|gararava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:garavath|garavath]] || [[word:garavaj|garavaj]] || [[word:garavash|garavash]] || [[word:garava|garava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:garafvath|garafvath]] || [[word:garafvaj|garafvaj]] || [[word:garafvash|garafvash]] || [[word:garafvaf|garafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:garavatha|garavatha]] || [[word:garavaja|garavaja]] || [[word:garavasha|garavasha]] || [[word:garavaka|garavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:garavath|garavath]] || [[word:garavaj|garavaj]] || [[word:garavash|garavash]] || [[word:garava|garava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:garavathal|garavathal]] || [[word:garavajal|garavajal]] || [[word:garavashal|garavashal]] || [[word:garavakal|garavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:garavathatha|garavathatha]] || [[word:garavajaja|garavajaja]] || [[word:garavashasha|garavashasha]] || [[word:garavaka|garavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:garavathan|garavathan]] || [[word:garavajan|garavajan]] || [[word:garavashan|garavashan]] || [[word:garavakan|garavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:garavathaoro|garavathaoro]] || [[word:garavajaoro|garavajaoro]] || [[word:garavashaoro|garavashaoro]] || [[word:garavakaoro|garavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
